foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235BexPh-text_html: And it doesn't end there: for each theme, we offer you three inspo for autumn gel or semi-permanent nails. If you want to rely on Cactus For You, click on the photos and discover our autumn nail polishes in the perfect colors to get flawless and trendy nails. So, shall we begin?
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235KxAPb-text_html: Marble Nails, as the name suggests, recall the veins of marble in their shapes and colors, giving depth to any shade. And to give a touch of light to your nails, just add gold and silver details.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235LQk1y-text_html: That's why we at Cactus For You we decided to give you a hand, collecting for you the best ideas for particular autumn nails.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235WoKnq-text_html: Bordeaux is confirmed as the protagonist of nail trends for the fall season. This shade, in all its nuances, adapts to every complexion and can be easily combined with any outfit.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235lThOl-text_html:
• Modern minimalism
  • Classic Bordeaux
  • Marble effect
  • Color scales
  • Romantic style
  • Fogautumn leaves
  • Craving for green
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235pFqYa-text_html:
Creating these manicure ideas is really simple, and you can do it with the products you prefer.

Thanks for reading this far. If you enjoyed our article on fall nail trends, stay tuned. There’s more inspiration to come!
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738235xSoQ1-text_html: Finding the right inspiration for an original manicure that keeps up with the latest trends can be a real challenge. Even if you love research, we know that it takes time… and that you often lack the time!
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733738591pkpI4-text_html: It’s the perfect time to show off minimalist fall nail designs. Thin lines, small circles, and other shapes pop against a natural base, or against contrasting backgrounds, for an ultra-modern effect.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733740181wp2pe-text_html: Autumn shades are perfect for creating chromatic scales that transform even the simplest of manicures into true style icons. If you want to experiment, without daring with too bold nail art, these colorful series represent the right balance between creativity and refinement.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-173374020690WCI-text_html: Little hearts are the best choice to add a romantic touch to each nail. Below you will find three inspo for you, from the most particular to the most classic.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733740237XOpm0-text_html: Nature is a great source of inspiration for every nail artist, especially in this season. The stylized leaves go perfectly with semi-permanent nail polishes in autumnal colors, such as brown and burgundy, and with neutral base colors.
foxify-1733738310qlvwt.f-richtext-1733740261VrsrN-text_html: Perfect for a single-color manicure or for imaginative nail art, green is one of the protagonists of autumn nail trends. Here are some suggestions that you can recreate on nails of different shapes and lengths.
